expectations.text: Writes the failing spec BEFORE writing the implementation
expectations.evidence: Scaffold → spec → red → implementation → green → refactor

expectations.text: Scope test includes a non-matching record (archived contact) to prove exclusion
Scope test includes a cross-account contact to prove account scoping
Uses contain_exactly or equivalent (not just include, which can't prove exclusion)
expectations.evidence: First `it` block uses `contain_exactly(active_contact)`. Additional `not_to include` blocks also present.

expectations.text: Scaffolds the empty scope method before the first test run (avoiding NameError red)
